# Shamrock

Shamrock is a Discord-to-Roblox management integration platform. It provides secure account linking, automated verification systems, and administrative tools for cross-platform community management.

## Pages

- [Home](https://shamrock-systems.github.io/website/) — Overview, feature cards, tech stack
- [Features](https://shamrock-systems.github.io/website/features.html) — Detailed feature breakdown: account linking, verification, admin tools, performance
- [Roadmap](https://shamrock-systems.github.io/website/roadmap.html) — Development phases from core integration through stable release
- [About](https://shamrock-systems.github.io/website/about.html) — Project status, license (Proprietary), tech stack (Discord.js, Roblox API, Node.js), contact via Discord

## Tech Stack

- Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no build tools
- Inter font family
- Deployed via GitHub Pages from the main branch
